mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
d.regDate t.typeName d.title d.writerEmpName d.docId
ASC DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT approvalDoc_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO approvalDoc ( docId, docTypeId, title, content, detailData, docStatus, writerEmpId, writerEmpName, writerDeptCode, writerDeptName, writerGradeCode, writerGradeName, regDate, submitDate ) VALUES ( #{docId}, #{docTypeId}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{docStatus}, #{writerEmpId}, #{writerEmpName}, #{writerDeptCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerDeptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerGradeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerGradeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, CASE WHEN #{docStatus} = 'PENDING' THEN SYSDATE ELSE NULL END )

INSERT INTO approvalLine ( lineId, docId, stepOrder, apprEmpId, apprEmpName, apprDeptCode, apprDeptName, apprGradeCode, apprGradeName, apprTypeCode, lineStatusCode ) VALUES ( approvalLine_seq.NEXTVAL, #{docId}, #{stepOrder}, #{apprEmpId}, #{apprEmpName}, #{apprDeptCode}, #{apprDeptName}, #{apprGradeCode}, #{apprGradeName}, 'APPROVER', 'WAIT' )
INSERT INTO approvalFile (fileId, docId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, regDate) VALUES (approvalFile_seq.NEXTVAL, #{docId}, #{oriFilename}, #{saveFilename}, #{fileSize}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus = 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus = 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = d.docId AND lineStatusCode = 'APPROVED') AS approvedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = d.docId) AS totalLineCount FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d WHERE d.writerEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'DRAFT'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

WITH firstWait AS ( SELECT docId, MIN(stepOrder) AS minOrder FROM approvalLine WHERE lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' GROUP BY docId ) SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName, l.lineStatusCode AS myLineStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = d.docId AND lineStatusCode = 'APPROVED') AS approvedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = d.docId) AS totalLineCount FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId INNER JOIN approvalLine l ON d.docId = l.docId LEFT JOIN firstWait fw ON l.docId = fw.docId WHERE (l.apprEmpId = #{empId} OR l.deputyEmpId = #{empId}) AND ( (d.docStatus = 'PENDING' AND l.lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' AND l.stepOrder = fw.minOrder) OR (l.lineStatusCode = 'APPROVED') OR (d.docStatus = 'ON_HOLD' AND l.lineStatusCode = 'HOLD') )
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

WITH firstWait AS ( SELECT docId, MIN(stepOrder) AS minOrder FROM approvalLine WHERE lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' GROUP BY docId ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d INNER JOIN approvalLine l ON d.docId = l.docId LEFT JOIN firstWait fw ON l.docId = fw.docId WHERE (l.apprEmpId = #{empId} OR l.deputyEmpId = #{empId}) AND ( (d.docStatus = 'PENDING' AND l.lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' AND l.stepOrder = fw.minOrder) OR (l.lineStatusCode = 'APPROVED') OR (d.docStatus = 'ON_HOLD' AND l.lineStatusCode = 'HOLD') )
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

WITH firstAction AS ( SELECT docId, apprEmpId FROM ( SELECT docId, apprEmpId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY docId ORDER BY stepOrder) AS rn FROM approvalLine WHERE lineStatusCode IN ('WAIT', 'HOLD') ) WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId INNER JOIN firstAction fa ON d.docId = fa.docId WHERE d.docStatus IN ('PENDING', 'ON_HOLD') AND ( fa.apprEmpId = #{empId} OR fa.apprEmpId IN ( SELECT delegatorEmpId FROM approvalDeputyReg WHERE deputyEmpId = #{empId} AND isActive = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN startDate AND endDate ) )
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

WITH firstAction AS ( SELECT docId, apprEmpId FROM ( SELECT docId, apprEmpId, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY docId ORDER BY stepOrder) AS rn FROM approvalLine WHERE lineStatusCode IN ('WAIT', 'HOLD') ) WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d INNER JOIN firstAction fa ON d.docId = fa.docId WHERE d.docStatus IN ('PENDING', 'ON_HOLD') AND ( fa.apprEmpId = #{empId} OR fa.apprEmpId IN ( SELECT delegatorEmpId FROM approvalDeputyReg WHERE deputyEmpId = #{empId} AND isActive = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN startDate AND endDate ) )
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName, r.readYn FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId INNER JOIN approvalReference r ON d.docId = r.docId WHERE r.refEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'CANCELED') AND r.readYn = 'N'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d INNER JOIN approvalReference r ON d.docId = r.docId WHERE r.refEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'CANCELED') AND r.readYn = 'N'
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE approvalReference SET readYn = 'Y', readDate = SYSDATE WHERE docId = #{docId} AND refEmpId = #{empId} AND readYn = 'N'
mapper.select:
SELECT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName, r.readYn FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId INNER JOIN approvalReference r ON d.docId = r.docId WHERE r.refEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'CANCELED')
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalDoc d INNER JOIN approvalReference r ON d.docId = r.docId WHERE r.refEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'CANCELED')
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT DISTINCT d.docId, d.title, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpName, d.writerGradeName, d.regDate, t.typeName, (SELECT lineStatusCode FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = d.docId AND apprEmpId = #{empId} AND ROWNUM = 1) AS myLineStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = d.docId AND lineStatusCode = 'APPROVED') AS approvedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = d.docId) AS totalLineCount FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId LEFT JOIN approvalLine l ON d.docId = l.docId LEFT JOIN approvalReference r ON d.docId = r.docId WHERE d.docStatus != 'DRAFT' AND ( d.writerEmpId = #{empId} OR (l.apprEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'CANCELED') OR (r.refEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'CANCELED') )
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.docId) FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalLine l ON d.docId = l.docId LEFT JOIN approvalReference r ON d.docId = r.docId WHERE d.docStatus != 'DRAFT' AND ( d.writerEmpId = #{empId} OR (l.apprEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'CANCELED') OR (r.refEmpId = #{empId} AND d.docStatus != 'CANCELED') )
AND d.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND d.regDate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND d.regDate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT d.docId, d.docTypeId, d.title, d.content, d.detailData, d.docStatus, d.writerEmpId, d.writerEmpName, d.writerDeptCode, d.writerDeptName, d.writerGradeCode, d.writerGradeName, TO_CHAR(d.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate, TO_CHAR(d.submitDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS submitDate, t.typeName, t.formCode FROM approvalDoc d LEFT JOIN approvalDocType t ON d.docTypeId = t.docTypeId WHERE d.docId = #{docId}

SELECT lineId, docId, stepOrder, apprEmpId, apprEmpName, apprDeptCode, apprDeptName, apprGradeCode, apprGradeName, apprTypeCode, lineStatusCode AS apprStatus, apprComment, TO_CHAR(apprDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS apprDate, isDeputy, deputyEmpId, deputyName, (SELECT dr.deputyName FROM approvalDeputyReg dr WHERE dr.delegatorEmpId = approvalLine.apprEmpId AND dr.isActive = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN dr.startDate AND dr.endDate AND ROWNUM = 1) AS activeDeputyName FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = #{docId} ORDER BY stepOrder ASC
SELECT fileId, docId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, TO_CHAR(regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM approvalFile WHERE docId = #{docId} ORDER BY fileId ASC

SELECT refId, docId, refEmpId, refEmpName, refDeptCode, refDeptName, refGradeCode, refGradeName, readYn, TO_CHAR(readDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS readDate, refComment, TO_CHAR(refCommentDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS refCommentDate FROM approvalReference WHERE docId = #{docId} ORDER BY refId ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM approvalDoc WHERE docId = #{docId} AND docStatus IN ('DRAFT', 'REJECTED')
mapper.update: UPDATE approvalDoc SET title = #{title}, docTypeId = #{docTypeId}, detailData = #{detailData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, docStatus = #{docStatus}, docVersion = docVersion + #{versionIncrement}, updateDate = SYSDATE, submitDate = CASE WHEN #{docStatus} = 'PENDING' THEN SYSDATE ELSE submitDate END WHERE docId = #{docId}

UPDATE approvalLine SET lineStatusCode = 'APPROVED', apprDate = SYSDATE, apprComment = #{comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDeputy = 'Y', deputyEmpId = #{empId}, deputyName = #{empName} WHERE docId = #{docId} AND ( (lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' AND stepOrder = ( SELECT MIN(stepOrder) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = #{docId} AND lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' )) OR lineStatusCode = 'HOLD' ) AND apprEmpId IN ( SELECT delegatorEmpId FROM approvalDeputyReg WHERE deputyEmpId = #{empId} AND isActive = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN startDate AND endDate )

UPDATE approvalLine SET lineStatusCode = 'REJECTED', apprDate = SYSDATE, apprComment = #{comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDeputy = 'Y', deputyEmpId = #{empId}, deputyName = #{empName} WHERE docId = #{docId} AND ( (lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' AND stepOrder = ( SELECT MIN(stepOrder) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = #{docId} AND lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' )) OR lineStatusCode = 'HOLD' ) AND apprEmpId IN ( SELECT delegatorEmpId FROM approvalDeputyReg WHERE deputyEmpId = #{empId} AND isActive = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN startDate AND endDate )

UPDATE approvalLine SET lineStatusCode = 'HOLD', apprDate = SYSDATE, apprComment = #{comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDeputy = 'Y', deputyEmpId = #{empId}, deputyName = #{empName} WHERE docId = #{docId} AND lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' AND stepOrder = ( SELECT MIN(stepOrder) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = #{docId} AND lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' ) AND apprEmpId IN ( SELECT delegatorEmpId FROM approvalDeputyReg WHERE deputyEmpId = #{empId} AND isActive = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN startDate AND endDate )
mapper.select: SELECT apprEmpId FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = #{docId} AND lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' AND stepOrder = ( SELECT MIN(stepOrder) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = #{docId} AND lineStatusCode = 'WAIT' )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvalLine WHERE docId = #{docId} AND lineStatusCode = 'WAIT'
mapper.update: UPDATE approvalDoc SET docStatus = 'PENDING' WHERE docId = #{docId} AND docStatus = 'ON_HOLD'
